title: Forsaken Spawn Totem (White)
body:
hi forsaken spawn followers

you know what to do

currently not for all ver but prob might work on any just ignore incompatibility message

Also [black](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/forsaken-spawn-totem-(black)) and [animated](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/forsaken-spawn-totem-(animated)) ver!

![Oh give thanks to the Spawn, for he is good; for their steadfast love endures forever.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Q5kivuIO/images/ba225b74cb85467a91bad88344d3cf68ce7f41a7.gif)
